full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Deciding which two components to ablate from LCGMM.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What are the two most important algorithmic components in LCGMM that could be ablated independently?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested (1) removing the kNN graph and (2) replacing KL with a different divergence measure.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Selected these because they are the paper's two explicit design choices over standard GMM and LapGMM.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Implementing the L2-based alternative to KL divergence in the M-step.
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: How would I modify the LCGMM M-step to use L2 norm of posterior difference instead of KL divergence as the edge weight?
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested using np.linalg.norm(R[i]-R[j]) as the scalar weight multiplied by (X[i]-X[j]).
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Implemented and verified that it runs without error; the 30% accuracy drop confirms the KL choice is critical.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Added sign correction to maintain directionality of the M-step update.
